import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; function Home({ currentUser }) { return (
Campus resale network

Move out lighter. Sell faster.

A simple marketplace for students trading dorm gear, furniture, and essentials before the term ends.

Browse listings {currentUser ? ( View your profile ) : ( Create account )}
2 Sample listings loaded at startup
File-backed API No MongoDB dependency required to boot this app
Fast filters Search by school, region, area, location, keyword, and category from the listings page
); } export default Home;
